questions.question: Puzzle 21: Red box is heavier than Blue but lighter than Green. Yellow is lighter than Blue. Which is heaviest?
questions.solution: Step 1: Green > Red > Blue > Yellow. Step 2: Green is heaviest. Answer: Green.
